sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_date String, value Float32);
SELECT id, parseDateTimeBestEffortUSOrZero(event_date) AS parsed_date FROM test_dates WHERE parsed_date = 0 AND (value > 10 OR value < 15);
SELECT id, (parseDateTimeBestEffortUSOrZero(event_date) AND value) AS conjunction_result FROM test_dates GROUP BY id HAVING conjunction_result > 0;
SELECT id, parseDateTimeBestEffortUSOrZero(event_date) AS parsed_date, value FROM test_dates WHERE parsed_date = 0 OR (parsed_date IS NULL AND value IS NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE test_table (user_id UInt32, last_login Nullable(String), score Int32);
SELECT user_id, parseDateTimeBestEffortUSOrZero(last_login) AS login_time, score FROM test_table WHERE (parseDateTimeBestEffortUSOrZero(last_login) AND score) IS NOT NULL;

SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM (SELECT user_id, parseDateTimeBestEffortUSOrZero(last_login) AS last_login_time, score FROM test_table) WHERE (last_login_time = 0 AND score > 100) GROUP BY user_id HAVING count > 0;
SELECT event_date, (parseDateTimeBestEffortUSOrZero(event_date) AND 1) AS conditional_value FROM test_dates WHERE conditional_value <> 0;
